name: Weekend appointment request
description: Patient asks for Sunday appointment; agent should reject and offer weekday.
goal: Schedule a routine checkup. You specifically want Sunday at 10 AM because you work weekdays. Push for Sunday once; if clearly unavailable, accept the next available weekday morning slot.
behavior: Be polite, natural, and concise (1-2 sentences per turn when possible)
Answer identity and insurance questions when asked
Do not mention you are a test bot or automated system
If asked for reason for visit, say annual physical / routine checkup
success_criteria: Agent must NOT confirm an appointment on Sunday or any weekend
Agent should state or imply the office is closed weekends
Agent should offer at least one valid weekday alternative
Agent should not invent appointment times without checking availability
